title: The Kiwi Storm [CWSM]
description: I made the Wither Storm look my friend Kiwicatking, This resource pack is cyan themed and replaced the wither themed stuff to be "Kiwi" Themed
body:
### This pack changed Crackers Wither Storm Mod To look like my friend Kiwicatking
![Kiwicatking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49720019b6d9a9b5958212c62720dc6563ae90d2_0.webp)

If your tired of the classic Wither Storm here is the texturepack! This overhauls the textures of the mod to be light blue repersenting **Kiwicatking** This is also my first texture pack.

**_Made By It's Cosmic, Inspired/Concept Kiwicatking_**
